problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: If Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins is applied to it, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
